issues.title: fix: closeTopModal checks .open instead of .active — Escape broken
issues.body:
## Problem

`closeTopModal` in `main.js` checked `classList.contains('open')` but modals use `.active` (`modals.js`). Escape never closed add/stats/settings/quantity-log modals.

## Expected

Escape closes the topmost open modal.

## Scope

- `src/app/modals.js` — add `isModalOpen()` / `closeTopModal()`
- `src/main.js` — wire hotkeys
issues.closeBody:
Fixed in https://github.com/krwg/cultiva/commit/55a2d56030414456354c5f3edc6965818570a7d4

Added `isModalOpen()` and `closeTopModal()` helpers; hotkeys now check `.active`.

issues.title: perf: renderGarden full innerHTML rebuild on every habit toggle
issues.body:
## Problem

`renderGarden()` cleared `gardenEl.innerHTML` and rebuilt all cards on every completion, causing layout jank with many habits.

## Proposal

Incremental DOM sync keyed by habit id + render fingerprint.
issues.closeBody:
Fixed in https://github.com/krwg/cultiva/commit/d1cbe2efa0188fcc61e4bfcea59eb430ff6507f7

`syncHabitCards()` patches cards in place using a `renderKey` fingerprint.

issues.title: perf: defer Discord, updates, onboarding, and lazy-load settings modules
issues.body:
## Problem

`main.js` eagerly initialized Discord RPC polling, updates UI, onboarding wizard, and static-imported heavy settings modules on every cold start.

## Proposal

- Extract `updates-ui.js` and `discord-settings.js`
- Dynamic `import()` for plugins catalog, stats dashboard, onboarding
- `requestIdleCallback` for Discord warmup and onboarding
issues.closeBody:
Fixed in https://github.com/krwg/cultiva/commit/6156900867ca35b93560e87d536e794d58706805

Extracted `updates-ui.js` and `discord-settings.js`; lazy imports and deferred onboarding/Discord init.

issues.title: build: add macOS (dmg, zip) and Linux (AppImage, deb) electron-builder targets
issues.body:
## Context

CHANGELOG 1.7 claims macOS/Linux targets but `package.json` build config and CI only produce Windows artifacts.

## Tasks

- [ ] Add `mac` and `linux` sections to electron-builder config
- [ ] Extend `.github/workflows/release.yml` matrix
- [ ] Update README platform badge and download table
- [ ] Test signed/unsigned builds per platform

issues.title: bug: auth password change UI does not hash password in updateProfile
issues.body:
## Problem

Edit profile collects `password` but `auth.updateProfile` merges raw fields without hashing. Email migration on change also absent.

## Options

1. Implement `changePassword()` with proper hashing
2. Remove password field from UI and document local-only profile scope

## Files

- `src/modules/auth.js`
- `src/main.js` (profile form)

issues.title: bug: seven keyboard shortcuts listed in Settings are not wired
issues.body:
## Problem

Settings → Shortcuts lists calendar navigation, focus mode toggle, and garden reload bindings that are not implemented in `hotkeys.js` or `calendar.js`.

## Tasks

- [ ] Implement shortcuts OR remove from Settings UI
- [ ] Remove stale `shortcutsSectionDesc` i18n key
- [ ] Align help dialog with active bindings

issues.title: docs: align README, CHANGELOG, and release.yml with Electron 40 / Vite 6 / 1.7 Linden
issues.body:
## Drift

- README tech stack: Electron 30, Vite 5
- README release notes link: 1.1.0 Cypress
- Footer vs CHANGELOG owner naming (FlokeStudio vs krwg)

## Tasks

- [ ] Update README tech stack and plugin catalog (6 plugins)
- [ ] Add 1.7 Linden release notes
- [ ] Point release workflow body_path to 1.7 notes

issues.title: docs: update PLUGIN_AUTHOR_GUIDE and cultiva-plugin.d.ts for 1.7 API
issues.body:
## Missing from public types/docs

- `context.ui.patchMainSheet`
- `context.app.getLocale` / `getThemeColor`
- `manifest.settings` contract
- RPC allowlist: `data.read`, `app.*`

## Tasks

- [ ] Refresh PLUGIN_AUTHOR_GUIDE.md (minAppVersion 1.7.0)
- [ ] Extend cultiva-plugin.d.ts
- [ ] Sync wiki Cultiva-Plugins-Guide.md

issues.title: security: document sandbox unsafe-eval and postMessage targetOrigin in SECURITY.md
issues.body:
## Context

Plugin sandbox uses `unsafe-eval` (required for `new Function`) and `postMessage(..., '*')` in `plugin-sandbox-host.js`.

## Tasks

- [ ] Add SECURITY.md section on sandbox threat model
- [ ] Evaluate narrowing postMessage origin where feasible
- [ ] Cross-link PLUGIN_AUTHOR_GUIDE permissions

issues.title: plugins: plugin settings save should fire onSettingsChange hook
issues.body:
## Problem

Saving manifest-driven plugin settings via `plugins-ui.js` writes storage and reloads lifecycle but bypasses `saveSettings()` → `onSettingsChange` hook path.

## Expected

Plugins receive locale/theme changes without disable/re-enable.

issues.title: a11y: plugin settings modal focus trap and calendar aria-label i18n
issues.body:
## Gaps

- Plugin settings modal (dynamic) lacks `installFocusTrap()`
- Calendar header controls hard-coded English aria-labels
- Context menu missing `role="menuitem"` and keyboard nav
- Habit cards: no roving tabindex / arrow-key navigation

## Reference

Partial 1.7 work: landmarks, main modal focus trap, prefers-reduced-motion

issues.title: feat: habit schedule (weekdays / N times per week)
issues.body:
## Problem

All habits are treated as daily. No weekday or frequency schedule field in `habits.js`.

## User story

As a user I want to mark "Exercise" only on Mon/Wed/Fri without breaking streak logic.

issues.title: feat: pause or archive habit without delete
issues.body:
## Problem

Only delete via context menu — users lose history when pausing seasonal habits.

## Proposal

- `archived` / `paused` flag on habit
- Hide from garden by default, preserve stats and calendar data

issues.title: feat: per-habit native reminders
issues.body:
## Context

`native-notifications.js` supports daily summary and calendar events only — not per-habit reminder times.

## Depends on

Optional schedule feature (#habit-schedule)

issues.title: feat: undo habit completion
issues.body:
## Problem

Accidental tap on Complete has no undo path.

## Proposal

Toast with Undo action or toggle completion when already done today (quantity habits need confirm).

issues.title: feat: manual habit reorder / drag sort in garden
issues.body:
## Context

Garden supports search filter only (`glyph-s-search.js`). No persisted sort order.

## Proposal

Drag handle on habit cards + `sortOrder` field in storage.

issues.title: feat: CSV export for habit completions
issues.body:
## Context

Export formats: JSON, ZIP, iCal. Spreadsheet export requested for analysis.

## Proposal

Add CSV export alongside backup UI; optional plugin using download bridge.

issues.title: plugins: read-only app.getHabits() API for reminder/analytics plugins
issues.body:
## Blocker

Plugins cannot read habit list — blocks habit-reminder, weekly-review, nudge plugins.

## Proposal

- Permission: `habits.read` or scoped read-only namespace
- Document in cultiva-plugin.d.ts

issues.title: plugins: calendar page plugin surface
issues.body:
## Problem

Calendar route has zero plugin integration; header/garden only.

## Proposal

Shared hooks or widget rail on `/pages/calendar/`.

issues.title: perf: split theme/ambient CSS from main.css for on-demand loading
issues.body:
## Context

`src/styles/main.css` is 3k+ lines with all palettes and ambient animations loaded upfront.

## Proposal

Extract per-theme CSS chunks; load active palette only.

issues.title: perf: unload plugin sandboxes when master toggle off
issues.body:
## Context

One hidden iframe per enabled plugin (`plugin-sandbox-host.js`). Master toggle disables UI but may retain iframes.

## Proposal

Tear down sandbox on disable; lazy recreate on enable.

issues.title: perf: batch IndexedDB writes during burst completions
issues.body:
## Context

Storage dual-write syncs on every `set()` — costly during rapid logging.

## Proposal

Micro-batch with requestAnimationFrame or debounce window.

issues.title: chore: remove dead i18n keys and legacy DOM cleanup IDs
issues.body:
## Items

- `shortcutsSectionDesc` (superseded by `shortcutsSectionDescActive`)
- `pluginSettingsComingSoon` (settings UI shipped)
- `weather-plugin-styles` hard-coded cleanup in plugin-manager
- `renderHeaderItem` / `renderGardenWidget` dead hook surface

issues.title: feat: system tray / menu bar quick-complete
issues.body:
## Context

Discord RPC exists; no tray icon for quick habit log from background.

## Proposal

Electron tray menu with today's habits; optional plugin API `ui.registerTray`.

issues.title: feat: notify user when installed plugin has registry update
issues.body:
## Problem

Plugin updates require manual re-install from registry.

## Proposal

Compare installed manifest version vs registry on app start; toast in Settings → Plugins.

issues.title: test: expand coverage for auth, hotkeys, onboarding, plugin install flow
issues.body:
## Gap

8 Vitest files cover habits, storage, plugin RPC, path guards — no renderer integration tests.

## Priority targets

- auth.js password hashing
- closeTopModal / hotkey wiring
- plugin install/uninstall E2E (Playwright or manual checklist automation)

issues.title: bug: quantity log hotkey omits currentValue and locale args
issues.body:
## Problem

`main.js` hotkey path calls `openQuantityLogModal(h)` without `currentValue` / `t`; garden click passes both (`garden-controller.js`).

## Fix

Pass today progress and `TRANSLATIONS[settings.lang]` from hotkey handler.

issues.title: docs: document GPL app vs MIT plugins license split in CONTRIBUTING
issues.body:
## Context

App is GPL-3.0; cultiva-plugins registry is MIT. Authors need clear guidance.

## Tasks

- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md license section
- [ ] Plugin submission checklist item
